background: If a parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability, then the system reliability is given by R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999.

task.query: If the i th component has failure time T_i for i=1,2,...,n and the parallel system will fail only upon failure of all of its components, thus, the system failure time is T_P=max_{1 ≤ i ≤ n} T_i.
task.method: 数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: Let us define f_i(t), F_i(t), and R_i(t) are, respectively, the failure time density, failure time distribution function and reliability function of the ith component. The failure time distribution function of the system is F(t)=P(T_P ≤ t)=∏_{i=1}^n F_i(t).
task.method: 数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: The system failure time density is f(t)=dF/dt=∑_{i=1}^n f_i(t) ∏_{j=1,j≠i}^n F_j(t).
task.method: 数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性
数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: The system failure rate can be obtained: r(t)=f(t)/R(t)=∑_{i=1}^n f_i(t) ∏_{j=1,j≠i}^n F_j(t) / (1-∏_{j=1,j≠i} F_j(t)).
task.method: 数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: If each of the n independent components has an exponential failure time distribution with constant failure rate λ_i, that is R_i(t)=e^(-λ_i t), then the system reliability is R(t)=1-∏_{i=1}^n (1-e^(-λ_i t)).
task.method: 数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: The mean time to failure of the system can be obtained M_tbf=∫_0^∞ R(t) dt=∫_0^∞ (1-∏_{i=1}^n (1-e^(-λ_i t))) dt.
For n=2, from the above formula we obtain the system MTTF M_tbf=1/λ_1 + 1/λ_2 - 1/(λ_1 + λ_2).
Similarly, it can be shown that for a 3-component parallel system, the system MTTF is given by M_tbf=1/λ_1 + 1/λ_2 + 1/λ_3 - 1/(λ_1 + λ_2) - 1/(λ_1 + λ_3) - 1/(λ_2 + λ_3) + 1/(λ_1 + λ_2 + λ_3).
